title: Hearts Of Women
content:
It is hard for a man to tell
    The hidden thought in his friend's heart,
    And the thought in a man's own heart
    Is a thing darker.

    If you have seen a woman's heart
    Bare to your eyes,
    Go quickly away and never tell
    What you have seen there.

    Street Song of Manchuria.
meaning:
Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator)'s contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Hearts Of Women"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
